arts.sum: After sealing their place in the semi-finals of the Copa del Rey with an impressive win in Mestalla on Thursday, Hansi Flick and his squad turn their attention back to La Liga. Hansi Flick has managed to infuse his team with boundless ambition that means they aren't happy with just winning games by the odd goal.

arts.ttl: Why Hansi Flick is so impressed with Eric Garcia at Barcelona
arts.sum: The defender has often come in for criticism from fans but Flick has made it clear he wants him in his squad and refused to let him leave in the January transfer window. A new report from Relevo has offered a bit of insight into why Flick is so fond of Eric, and it’s not just the fact that he was able to communicate with him easily from the off as the defender speaks excellent English.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star leaves ‘with bitter taste in his mouth’ after meeting with Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick held an uncomfortable meeting with an unhappy member of his squad this week. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Iñaki Peña as the…

arts.ttl: Pedri labels Real Madrid as ‘best shirt swap’ at Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri has opened up on his midfield idols in a superb interview with the club’s media channels. Pedri has returned to full fitness and influence this season, taking his spot in the engine room for club and country, to brilliant effect. The 22-year-old has come full circle in his fitness battle to retake […] The post Pedri labels Real Madrid as ‘best shirt swap’ at Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona add new name to Champions League squad following Unai Hernández departure
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have added a new name to the club’s Champions League squad list for the 2nd half of the campaign. The player called up? Noah Darvich. A…

arts.ttl: 4 Barcelona stars could be sold this summer
arts.sum: Four members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona could be on the move in the summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Friday provided an…

arts.ttl: Toni Fernandez promoted to Barca Atletic and handed new shirt number
arts.sum: Barcelona have confirmed that talented teenager Toni Fernandez has been promoted to Albert Sanchez’s Barca Atletic side for the second half of the season. Toni Fernández lucirá a partir de ahora el dorsal 1️⃣6️⃣ como jugador con ficha del Barça Atlètic

arts.ttl: Barcelona star claims he is enjoying ‘the best season of my career’
